titleStmt.title: SII 40.284: original edition by K. Munirathnam
No. 284. (A.R. No. B. 329 of 1933.) Peddamakkena, Sattenapalle Taluk, Guntur District, Andhra Pradesh.

summary.p: On a Nandi-pillar set up opposite to the temple of Kōdaṇḍarāmasvāmi.
This is dated Śaka 1097, (giri-nidhi-gagana-ksheśa) Tulā Saṅkrānti, śu. 11, Sunday, corresponding to 1175 A.D., October 27, however the cyclic year was Manmatha.

Gives the genealogy of Prōlana-Nāyaka of Intēṛu, on the bank of the Tuṅgabhadrā in Velanāṇḍu-dēśa, who was the minister of the king. Further, it records that he gifted some land for burning a perpetual lamp to the god Amarēśvara.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti prasiddha bhūtala
cakramē ṇa daraṇa cā
rulī(śī)laḥ śrī goṁkkabhūpakula vikrama ni
tya lakṣmī . kṣīrōdadhīrati samunnati pūrnna
caṁdraḥ . saujanyavārddhiratulābhyudayō
jayaśrī krīḍāvihāra ramaṇīya guṇā
bhirāmaḥ rājēṁdracōḍanṛ pativvijētāri
varggō vēṁgībhuvaṁbhujabalādakhilāṁ bhi
bhartti . tasya prōdyatpradhitayaśasaḥ pārtthivā
khaṇḍalasya dēśēṣvagryē nikhilavēlanāḍaiśapaṣa
prasiddhaḥ tasminviraprakṛti janatāvāsa bhūstuṁ
ggabhadrātīrē grāmōjagatividhitō nityami
ṁtēṟusajñaḥ . jajñētatra caturtthavaṁśa
tilakassatsaṁpradāyā śrīya śrīmatti
kkananāmadhēyadiditō bejjāṁbikā nā
yakaḥ tābhyāmugatapaḥ prabhāvaja
nita śrīdāmanō vikrama krāṁtāśēṣaja
ga trayōguṇanidhi śrīmalla bhūvallabhaḥ .
sōyaṁ samastaripu marddhana bāhuviryya
śrī goṁkkabhūparipu saṁkṣaya kāladaṁḍaḥ
yasmānmapradita saṁggaravikramōya
mākhaṁḍala prakṛtimaṇḍala māvṛṇōti .
tasmādbhī mamahāhavōdbhaṭa gajapratya
kṣapaṁcchānanaṁ saṁgrāmōdyatakoṇalōka
nṛpatērhaṁttāramapyagrataḥ yaṁttaṁ cō
ḍa mahīpaterakigaḍacede kripāṇāṁ vi
dullēbhē prōlananāyakaṁ priyasutaṁ śrī
dāmanānnallamā . sōyaṁ śrīma
cchakābdē girinidhigaganakṣēśa saṁkhyētu
lāsyējānē saṁkrāṁttikālē dinapati
divasē śuklapakṣē viśēṣādiṁlēṭi prō
lanāma samadiśadamarārāma śarvvā
yadīpamēkādaśyāmakhaṁḍaṁ śubhaguṇa
caritō yāvadācaṁdratāraṁ . kritvāpū
rvvaṁ praditasamayaṁ dōrmmadyōkō
kabhīmōhatvānatvānikhila vi
ditaṁ bhīmanādaṁ mahēśaṁ paśvā
tcākyaisara sapayōsāsvarnnapā
trējigīṣōstūrnaṁ pūrnaṁ prakṛta
samayaṁ svāminaḥ karttumagrē
yēna pratāpacaturaṁ vinayama
diryya rājēṁdra cōḍanṛ pateriha
koṇabhūpaṁhanmiticaṁḍarsamajña
dyatasainya madhyē sadhyainyapōti sama
rabhuvilōkabhūpaḥ . tasmaiciraṁ prō
layanāyakāya dēvāya Iśō
śvatādabhīṣṭaṁ gaṁggataraṁgaprasarattu
ṣōkasaṁgojvalatgōrataraṁdumōviḥ .
Digital edition of SII 40.284 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
